title: cystopteris fragilis subsp. eufragilis
intro: Cystopteris fragilis subsp. eufragilis, also known as fragile fern, is a subspecies of fern belonging to the family Cystopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cystopteris fragilis subsp. eufragilis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried or made into a tea, and it is also used in some traditional remedies to treat digestive issues and skin problems.
